global_objective: Multi-batch integration walkthrough: a 3-task parallel batch (one retried) plus a dependent task.

tasks.justification: Bounded delivery of part A with a clear AC.
tasks.instructions: Implement part A, referencing scenario R1.S1 from the spec.
tasks.expected_output_schema: Part A implemented and its test passing

test_contract.assertion: Part A is done and its test passes

tasks.justification: Bounded delivery of part B with a clear AC.
tasks.instructions: Implement part B, referencing scenario R2.S1 from the spec.
tasks.expected_output_schema: Part B implemented and its test passing

test_contract.assertion: Part B is done and its test passes

tasks.justification: Bounded delivery of part C with a clear AC.
tasks.instructions: Implement part C, referencing scenario R3.S1 from the spec.
tasks.expected_output_schema: Part C implemented and its test passing

test_contract.assertion: Part C is done and its test passes

tasks.justification: Combines the outputs of task-a, task-b and task-c; depends on all three.
tasks.instructions: Implement part D, referencing R4.S1; combines the outputs of task-a, task-b and task-c.
tasks.expected_output_schema: Part D implemented and its test passing

test_contract.assertion: Part D is done and its test passes
